case_title: LEE, CALVIN et al vs. CANUL, ROSALIA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT CANUL, ROSALIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CANUL, ROSALIA BARBOZA, SANTIAGO

M4/#504, COMM SUE KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON 1400: CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. MICHAEL HALL FOR PLAINTIFFS, WHO ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ROSALIA CANUL AND SANTIAGO BARBOSA IN PROPRIA PERSONA WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER JOSE CASTILLO. SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. IF DEFENDANTS VACATE 3239 MISSION ST #2 ON OR BEFORE 10AM SUNDAY, 6-7-98, AND DELIVER KEYS & GARAGE DOOR OPENER, PLAINTIFFS WILL DELIVER A CASHIER'S CHECK TO DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2000, AND WILL WAIVE UNPAID RENT. SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE APPLIED TO BACK RENT. IF DEFENDANTS COMPLY, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANTS FAIL TO COMPLY, PLAINTIFFS WILL MOVE EX PARTE WITH 24 HOURS NOTICE FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION & UNPAID RENT AS OF DELIVERY OF PREMISES.
